atDirectives.name: @tailwind
atDirectives.description: Use the `@tailwind` directive to insert Tailwind's `base`, `components`, `utilities`, and `screens` styles into your CSS.

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Use the `@apply` directive to inline existing utility classes into your custom CSS. This is useful when you find a common utility pattern in your HTML that you’d like to extract to a new component.
